title: US, Israel Attack Iran As Trump Urges Regime Change
description: The US and Israel began striking targets across Iran, with President Donald Trump urging Iranians to overthrow the government in a conflict that threatens to spiral across the oil-rich Middle East.  For details, David Gura and Christina Ruffini speak to Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche and Ethan Bronner. (Source: Bloomberg)
